title: Find My Device - Don't Allow - Enable now - Allow Once [Only This Time - Android] [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Find My Device location permission prompt reappears after denying and re-enabling from system settings, with Find My Device screen visible in background
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Tap the menu icon (hamburger menu) to open the app menu.
4. Tap 'Find My Device' from the menu.
5. Observe the location permission prompt that appears with options 'Allow Once', 'Allow while using app', and 'Don't allow'.
7. Observe the new prompt that appears with options 'Cancel' and 'Enable Now', with the Find My Device screen visible in the background.
9. Observe that the app navigates to the system Location Services settings.
10. In system Location Services settings, select 'Ask Next Time or When I Share'.
11. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
12. Observe the location permission prompt that reappears with options 'Allow Once', 'Allow while using app', and 'Don't allow', with the Find My Device screen still visible in the background.
expected: After returning to the app, the location permission prompt should reappear with 'Allow Once', 'Allow while using app', and 'Don't allow' options, and the Find My Device screen should remain visible in the background.
